title: 짝남 꼬시는 유일한 방법 | 밀당의 정석
text: Yes, hello. This is Seoul. Generally speaking, men don't get emotional sparks unless they are hooked on a woman. While women often end up falling for a man because of his assertiveness and inner qualities, even if he doesn't fit their external ideal, men are less likely to get sparks if he doesn't match their tastes, no matter how hard a woman tries. So, if a man doesn't seem interested in a woman, it's correct to assume he isn't interested right now. Men, driven by the instinct for procreation, have a habit of instinctively searching for partners they can satisfy. When they come back from downtown, they only remember one or two pretty women out of ten, and they cannot remember the remaining eight—those who don't fit their taste. In other words, people who aren't their type don't stand out that much, and their feelings don't seem that important to them either. Women who have liked a man who wasn't interested in soldiers will understand. If a man is n't interested, he really isn't interested at all. It's quite terrible. I roughly estimate the time frame to be around 4 days plus or minus 10, and I call this period the " Animal Farm period." During this Animal Farm period, if a man and a woman get even a little bit of a spark, they easily end up dating. Unless he has family issues or is a young man engrossed in his work, most men easily jump to the initial intensity and shoot big as soon as they start feeling attraction. However, once a man's "animal farm" phase ends, it is no longer enough for a woman to simply fit the situation. As his animalistic instincts diminish and he overthinks, sparks do not fly as easily as before, even if the woman is hurting more by not matching her physical ideal or if they are in the "flirting" stage. Men become a bit pickier as they start meeting multiple times to see if she is the woman made for them, engaging in conversations, and conducting their own kind of ideological vetting. Situations arise where it seems like they are definitely flirting and contacting each other occasionally, but the man's demeanor is lukewarm; he might not confess at the crucial moment, or even if physical intimacy has occurred, there is no burning passion visible from him. There is only one way to make him fall for you: you just need to make him appear in your dreams. How do you do that? You just need to make him remember you as that good woman. Men are creatures with weak memories. You just need to use those memories.
